summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CIA SERVICIOS enterprise management system. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate), but critical frontend React errors prevent full module navigation.

critical_bugs.issue: React runtime error: 'Objects are not valid as a React child' when navigating between modules after certain operations
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents navigation to Projects and Quotes pages, breaks user workflow
critical_bugs.error_message: Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {type, loc, msg, input, ctx})

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation works initially but breaks after creating new records

integration_issues.issue: JavaScript bundle errors prevent full module usage

passed_tests: Login page displays CIA logo correctly
Super Admin Dashboard displays with stats and company table
Company creation form in Super Admin
CRM page loads and displays client statistics
All 15 backend API endpoints (auth, companies, clients, projects, quotes, dashboard stats)
Monthly revenue and project progress endpoints

critical_fixes_needed: Fix React runtime error in frontend navigation system - objects being passed as React children
Debug JavaScript bundle issues causing module navigation failures
Investigate and fix cross-module navigation after CRUD operations
recommendations: Check React component props for invalid object passing
Review routing configuration and state management
Test navigation flows after each CRUD operation

success_percentage.frontend: 60% (login, basic navigation, CRM works; Projects/Quotes navigation broken)
